focus: template fidelity, reference overflow boundaries, relative-path/tool-claim verification

findingDetails.title: Report-shape references claim anchors and a Section 1 title the actual contract/template do not provide
findingDetails.evidence: SKILL.md:155 and benchmark_report_template.md:37 define Section 1 as HEADLINE / OVERVIEW; worked_example.md:45 teaches HEADLINE, and worked_example.md:94 plus template line 22 claim ANCHOR pairs that are not present in the checked template.
findingDetails.recommendation: Align the worked example with HEADLINE / OVERVIEW and either add real anchor-pair placeholders to the template or remove anchor-pair claims.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Focused grep/read over target packet found the contradictory lines and no matching anchor-pair syntax in the template evidence read.

findingDetails.title: Template-local markdown links do not resolve in the checked asset location
findingDetails.evidence: Packet-local link scan found nine missing relative targets from active links in benchmark_report_template.md, including ./SOURCE.md, ./results.csv, ./per-probe.jsonl, ./runtime-measurements.md, and ../README.md.
findingDetails.recommendation: Make copy-time links visibly templated/non-clickable in the source asset or state that they resolve only after copying into a benchmark folder.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Markdown-link scan checked 9 markdown files and found missing relative targets only in benchmark_report_template.md.

noveltyJustification: Fresh packet iteration with two new active findings; weighted new=6 and weighted total=6.
